scripts.build: tsc --noEmit --pretty false && vite build && node scripts/copy-legacy-assets.mjs
scripts.pretest:photoreal: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const source='/tmp/bonsai-photoreal-v7-preview.pid'; const legacy='/tmp/bonsai-photoreal-v6-preview.pid'; if (fs.existsSync(source)) fs.copyFileSync(source, legacy);"
